title: Automated energy saving bed
abstract: An automated energy saving bed (1) in a collapsible dome made from non-tearable insulated plastic or woven cloth (4), configured to be opened and closed over a bed, using automation with sensor, voice recognition, with real time clock, alternatively manually by remote control or manually pulling over a pulley. It saves energy equal to ratio of volume of room to volume of dome, during a sleep at night or day. The automated energy saving Bed (1) is integrated with Heating, cooling and ventilation (HCV) individual unit, to the required bed dome tonnage. The dome tonnage and energy at demand side is reduced, by enhanced energy efficacy with quality of air and comfort using HCV which reduce the power required by automated energy saving bed, further powered by renewable energy or conventional energy, make the system zero or low carbon product and economical at utilization.
claims:
Claims I CLAIM: 1. An automated energy saving bed, comprising: a bed (1); an air-conditioner; an insulated enclosure for holding an air-conditioned air, maintaining the desired temperature inside the enclosed place covering the resting side of the bed (1) from all the open sides for making the enclosed portion of the bed (1) air tight; a cool air outlet; sliding panels; an electric power backup; an automated collapsible dome made from non-tearable insulated material (4) configured to be opened and closed over the bed (1); an aluminium skeleton (2) pivoted over an independent aluminium slab (3) on either side of the bed (1); an aluminium "C" section fixed over insulated material cloth (4) over a skeleton of dome using velcro (5); a fast heating, cooling and ductless ventilation (HCV) for quality of air system for climatic control being mounted over a wall; an air curtain (6, 8) slot type with vertical and horizontal being mounted over a plenum; the plenum mounted around the peripheral above the vertical and horizontal over the bed (1); a sound absorber material fixed within the plenum; and a fire redundant plastic, fire and smoke detector, wireless speaker for audio, alerts, alarms being provided within the dome, characterized in that 

 the collapsible dome made of multiple aluminium hollow rectangle "C" section skeleton; the dome being automated through tubular motor, fixed over a wall; the dome configured to be opened and closed by moving tubular motor counter clockwise or clockwise direction using stainless steel wire winding and/or unwinding over pulley; a ratio of volume of room to volume of dome, the energy saved during a night or rest at day; the air flow around the plenum enables heating, cooling and ductless ventilation to remain within the peripheral of the bed (1); an operation depending on climatic control for led lighting, comfort and quality of air; the dome configured to be operated in real time operation without human interface, voice recognition, alternatively manually by remote control; a digital printing is provided over the non-tearable insulated material (4); and an energy saving bedroom having a transparent plastic polycarbonate structure with sliding operation. 2. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein said insulated enclosure carries entry and exit means is configured to provide an easy entry and exit from the enclosed bed (1). 3. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the electric power backup is provided for supporting the insulated air conditioner. 4. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the insulating enclosure having one or more layers of the same or different insulating material (4). 5. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the inner surface of the insulated enclosure having sufficient height from the upper horizontal resting surface for comfortable sitting upon said upper resting surface. 6. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the entry and exit means of the insulating enclosure is to be fitted with transparent polycarbonate single or double walled panel windows. 7. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the automatic operation is provided in real time clock without human interface by central controller, zones control, with occupancy detect, voice recognition or by remote control. 8. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the bed (1) is provided for taking rest and wherein the air-conditioner is connected for air-conditioning operation. 9. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the fully automated dome or dome-less air curtains (6, 8) over the peripheral of the bed (1). 10. The automated energy saving bed as claimed in claim 1, wherein the collapsible dome skeleton (2) made from aluminum hollow rectangular tubes 

 coated with polyurethane paint is fixed at rear side of the bed (1) attached towards wall, within the room.
